productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Brush Print Green Casual Shoes
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this All-Star series of art canvas shoes from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue in contrast colour for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityArt design in brush print on upper for enhanced style MidsoleComfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
